PARAM.description:
when computing the loess fit at
a particular point, this fraction of source points closest
to the current point is taken into account for computing
a least-squares regression.
A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH}.
PARAM.name: bandwidth
PARAM.content:
when computing the loess fit at
a particular point, this fraction of source points closest
to the current point is taken into account for computing
a least-squares regression.
A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH}.

PARAM.description:
This many robustness iterations are done.
A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any
robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS}.
PARAM.name: robustnessIters
PARAM.content:
This many robustness iterations are done.
A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any
robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS}.

PARAM.name: bandwidth
PARAM.content:
when computing the loess fit at
a particular point, this fraction of source points closest
to the current point is taken into account for computing
a least-squares regression.
A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH}.

PARAM.name: robustnessIters
PARAM.content:
This many robustness iterations are done.
A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any
robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is
{@link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS}.

PARAM.name: accuracy
PARAM.content:
If the median residual at a certain robustness iteration
is less than this amount, no more iterations are done.

THROWS.description: if bandwidth does not lie in the interval [0,1].
THROWS.name: OutOfRangeException
THROWS.content: if bandwidth does not lie in the interval [0,1].

PARAM.description: the arguments for the interpolation points
PARAM.name: xval
PARAM.content: the arguments for the interpolation points

PARAM.description: the values for the interpolation points
PARAM.name: yval
PARAM.content: the values for the interpolation points

RETURN.description: A cubic spline built upon a loess fit to the data at the original abscissae
RETURN.content: A cubic spline built upon a loess fit to the data at the original abscissae

THROWS.description: if xval not sorted in strictly increasing order.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if {@code xval} not sorted in strictly increasing order.

THROWS.description: if xval and yval have different sizes.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if {@code xval} and {@code yval} have different sizes.

THROWS.description: if xval or yval has zero size.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if {@code xval} or {@code yval} has zero size.

THROWS.description: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.
THROWS.name: NotFiniteNumberException
THROWS.content: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.

THROWS.description: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data (i.e. the bandwidth must be larger than 2/n).
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data (i.e. the bandwidth must be larger than 2/n).

PARAM.description: point weights: coefficients by which the robustness weight of a point is multiplied.
PARAM.name: weights
PARAM.content: point weights: coefficients by which the robustness weight of a point is multiplied.

RETURN.description: values of the loess fit at corresponding original abscissae.
RETURN.content: values of the loess fit at corresponding original abscissae.
